Content: Brain tumor detection is one of the most important applications of deep learning in medical imaging. This study explores convolutional neural networks and transfer learning models for automatic brain tumor classification using MRI images. The proposed approach aims to improve diagnostic accuracy while reducing manual effort.

Content: Brain tumors are abnormal growths of cells inside the brain. Early detection is essential because delayed diagnosis may lead to severe complications. Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is widely used for detecting brain tumors. Deep learning models have demonstrated excellent performance in analyzing MRI images automatically.
